backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing pickup lines with validation, storage, reporting, and generation of usage guides.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing purposes of all frontend files.
frontend/BUILDING.md: Setup and build instructions for developing and deploying the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base file defining light/dark theme tokens and global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component managing views, search, random selection, and data fetching state.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky header with logo fallback and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: App layout with themed background, header, main content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/PickupLineDetail: Modal showing a pickup line with usage guide, copy feature, and reporting.
frontend/src/components/PickupLineFeed.t: Displays a searchable feed of pickup lines with filtering, error handling, and reporting functionality.
frontend/src/components/StickerIcon.tsx: Renders a 64x64 sprite-based sticker icon selected by index from a larger sprite sheet.
frontend/src/components/SubmitPickupLine: Provides a form to submit multi-line pickup lines with validation, error display, and mutation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user’s identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an authentication context using Internet Identity, handling login, stored identities, and state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, submitting, and reporting pickup lines using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind and theme variables, defining colors, layout utilities, and rendering helpers.
frontend/src/lib/validation.ts: Validates pickup line text for length and minimum line count, returning structured errors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the root component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom fonts, color tokens, extended components, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing product vision, architectural notes, known issues, and existing feature definitions for a pickup-line discovery web app.
